# Dagger of Goddess of Goddesses
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Dagger%20of%20Goddess%20of%20Goddesses&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Dagger of Goddess of Goddesses
| desc = Taken from the deep ends of the Trench.
| tier = UT
| rarity = h
| slot = dagger

| minDmg = 150
| maxDmg = 190
| shots = 1
| rof = 85
| range = 
| projSpeed = 33.3
| lifetime = 200
| fameb = 6
| feedp = 1250

| lootbag = white
| dropsFrom = can be found in a White Bag dropped by: [[Thessal the Mermaid Goddess]]
|range2 = 6.19}}

<noinclude>
{{NavDaggers}}
</noinclude><noinclude>
[[Category: Daggers]]</noinclude><noinclude>
[[Category:Tiered weapons]]</noinclude>
